title: Master Playwright/Cypress at Scale
description: Architect stable and selector-resilient E2E test suites using tools like Playwright or Cypress. Utilize automatic waiting and multi-tab orchestration to enhance the reliability of browser automation.
objectives: Architect stable and selector-resilient E2E test suites using tools like Playwright or Cypress.
Utilize automatic waiting and multi-tab orchestration to enhance the reliability of browser automation.
